issues_today.title: Mobile-order conversion drop in Midwest
issues_today.summary: App add-to-cart -> order conversion fell 4.1 pp in the past 7 days across IL, MI, OH stores. Push-notification CTR is steady; checkout-step abandonment is the driver.
issues_today.agent_recommendation: Loyalty agent suggests a 3-tap checkout flow A/B test for the affected region.

issues_today.title: Arabica spot price spike — Brazil drought
issues_today.summary: Brazil drought is lifting Q2 arabica futures 14% above plan. Hearth's Brazil-origin blend is 41% of green-bean spend.
issues_today.agent_recommendation: Supply-chain agent recommends accelerating Q3 Vietnam-robusta blend share by 5 pp and hedging 60% of Q3 arabica exposure.

issues_today.title: Drive-thru speed degradation in Texas
issues_today.summary: Median drive-thru service time in TX trending up: 247s (vs 198s national median). Concentrated in DFW and Houston metros at 7-9am peak.
issues_today.agent_recommendation: Staffing agent flags understaffing at peak hour at 84 TX stores; recommends a +0.6 FTE peak-hour add.
